Gifted Fingers Massage

Healing touch,
wherever you are

All sessions are fully mobile — we bring the table, oils, and ambience to your space.

Gifted Fingers

"Healing your body, mind & spirit."
Professional, certified mobile massage therapists serving Lagos and surroundings. We come to your home, office, hotel, or event fully equipped.

Book a Session


Our Treatments

🌊

01

Swedish Relaxation Massage

Long, flowing strokes that melt away tension and ease the nervous system into deep calm. Perfect for first-time clients or a pure unwind.

60 / 90 mins
💪

02

Deep Tissue Therapy

Targeted pressure on chronic muscle knots — ideal for desk workers and athletes needing deep, lasting relief.

60 / 90 mins
🤱

03

Prenatal Massage

Gentle, nurturing bodywork for expectant mothers — relieves back pain, swelling, and pregnancy fatigue safely.

60 mins
🌸

04

Aromatherapy Massage

Swedish techniques enhanced with therapeutic essential oils — lavender, eucalyptus, or custom blends chosen for your mood.

75 / 90 mins
💑

05

Couples Massage

Two therapists, one space — share a restorative session with your partner, friend, or family member side by side.

60 / 90 mins
🏢

06

Corporate Wellness Package

Chair or table massage brought to your office. Boost team morale and productivity with scheduled wellness visits.

Custom

Soulful Sips Drinks

Nourish from
the inside out

Handcrafted with intention. Every sip is a step toward balance, vitality, and inner glow.

Our Signature Drinks

Phoenix Blend

Ginger · Beetroot · Carrot · Pineapple. Purifies and renews from within — restores balance and awakens the body's natural rhythm of healing.

Revitalise · Renew

VitalHeal-C

Ginger · Garlic · Carrot · Pineapple · Oranges · Turmeric · Black Pepper. Immune & cardiovascular support, collagen boosting, mood lifting.

Immunity · Energy

Zobo — Spice of Her

Hibiscus · Aidan Fruit · Star Anise · Ginger · Cinnamon · Cloves · Cayenne · Dates. Rich, bold, and deeply nourishing.

Antioxidant · Cleanse

TigerNut — Cocoa Serenade

Cocoa Powder · Ginger · Coconut · Raisins · Dates. A smooth, creamy drink with deep earthy richness and natural energy.

Energy · Gut Health

Green Vitality Shot

Moringa · Cucumber · Lime. A powerful green shot that energises, detoxes, and supports skin health from within.

Detox · Skin Glow

Moonlight Sleep Tonic

Chamomile · Valerian · Warm spices · Honey. Gently eases you into restful, deep, restorative sleep.

Sleep · Calm

All drinks are made fresh with no preservatives, no added sugar. Keep refrigerated and consume within 3 days for best results. Available for delivery across Lagos and as massage add-ons.
